throughputCadence.description: A throughput decode cadence is promotable only when it is not slower than parity cadence and its reported batch work resolves almost all executed batch decode tokens before returning to the generation loop.

warm.description: Cold HTTP compare runs use direct range reads, skip eager full-shard hash verification, coalesce ranges into shard-sized blocks, and opt RDRR manifests into bounded whole-shard prefetch; manifest preflight and pinned hosted revisions remain recorded in the compare artifact.

cold.description: Cold HTTP compare runs use direct range reads, skip eager full-shard hash verification, coalesce ranges into shard-sized blocks, and opt RDRR manifests into bounded whole-shard prefetch; manifest preflight and pinned hosted revisions remain recorded in the compare artifact.

dopplerKvCachePlan.reason: tokenizer-accurate synthetic prompt budget plus decode target and tokenizer tolerance

loadModeResolution.profileDefaultReason: Transformers.js WebGPU q4f16 for Qwen 3.5 2B completes warmup under OPFS, then fails the timed run after the strict offline switch; HTTP load mode keeps the shared WebGPU compare lane runnable and records the load mode explicitly.

prefillPhaseMs.doppler: available inside Doppler payload timing.prefillMs as internal_prefill_phase
prefillPhaseMs.transformersjs: excluded from compare contract because runner prefillMs is a ttft_proxy

cacheSemantics.warm: Prime engine cache before timed run, then run from local persistent cache only (loadMode=http; Doppler browser load mode http; TJS persistent browser cache).
cacheSemantics.cold: Wipe engine-specific persistent cache state before run (loadMode=http; Doppler browser load mode http/profile wipe; TJS profile wipe).

semantics.opCount: Logical compute dispatches recorded into batch-decode command buffers.
semantics.passCount: Actual WebGPU compute passes opened while recording batch-decode command buffers.
semantics.uniqueOpLabels: Number of distinct exact compute-pass labels recorded in batch-decode command buffers.
semantics.msPerOp: decodeRecordMs divided by logical recorded compute dispatches.
semantics.msPerPass: decodeRecordMs divided by actual WebGPU compute passes.
semantics.passesPerOp: Actual WebGPU compute passes divided by logical recorded compute dispatches.
semantics.msPerExecutedBatchToken: decodeRecordMs divided by batch-path tokens submitted for execution.
semantics.opsPerExecutedBatchToken: Logical recorded compute dispatches divided by batch-path tokens submitted for execution.
semantics.passesPerExecutedBatchToken: Actual WebGPU compute passes divided by batch-path tokens submitted for execution.
semantics.topOps: Highest-count exact compute-pass labels observed during command recording.

semantics.effectiveSubmitReadbackWaitMs: max(decodeSubmitWaitMs, decodeReadbackWaitMs); submit and readback waits overlap.
semantics.readbackMapWaitMs: Wall time awaiting staging-buffer mapAsync; usually includes GPU completion behind the readback.
semantics.gpuTimestampMs: Timestamp-query GPU work when available; null means it was not captured.

semantics.executedBatchTokens: Total GPU batch-path decode tokens recorded/submitted for execution.
semantics.resolvedBatchTokens: Batch-path tokens retained by stop resolution before returning to the generation loop.
semantics.outputDecodeTokens: Decode tokens credited to output throughput metrics.

formatFairness.reason: formats differ and must be disclosed with any claim

semantics.claimGrade: true means the primary compare section passed paired correctness, prompt/decode validity, same runtime surface, pinned comparator model, and performance-comparable lane gates.
semantics.releaseClaimable: true means claimGrade evidence measured the hosted quickstart-registry Doppler artifact.
semantics.localComparable: true means claimGrade evidence exists but is local-artifact evidence, not a hosted release claim.
semantics.formatFairness: different optimized formats are allowed only as disclosed product-format comparisons, not format-identical engine claims.
